auth.tagline: One home for the lists you keep together.
auth.signUpPasswordHint: Avoid common or reused passwords. Even if the field looks valid, passwords found in data breaches cannot be used.

noAccess.title: You don't have access to this list
noAccess.description: This list doesn't exist, or you're not a member of it. Ask the owner to invite you if you think this is a mistake.

lists.emptyActiveDescription: Create your first list and share it with your person.
lists.emptyArchivedDescription: Lists you archive together will show up here.

createList.title: Create a list
createList.description: Give it a name and pick a type to help you find it later.
createList.recurringHint: Keeps its items between shopping trips

listSettings.recurringHint: Keeps its items between shopping trips
listSettings.renameDescription: Choose a new name for this list.
listSettings.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes the list and all of its items. This cannot be undone.

dates.addDescription: Add a birthday, anniversary, or other date you want to remember together.
dates.editDescription: Update the details for this date.
dates.recurringHint: We'll remind you again next year
dates.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes this date. This cannot be undone.
dates.emptyDescription: Add birthdays, anniversaries, and other dates you want to celebrate together.
dates.unpairedTitle: Pair up to track dates together
dates.unpairedBody: Pair with your partner in Settings to start remembering birthdays, anniversaries, and more.
dates.countdownDays: in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}

occasion.reminderBody: {label} in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
occasion.reminderBodyWithIdeas: {label} in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} — gift ideas: {ideas}

shareLink.shareDescription: Anyone with this link can view and reserve items on this list, no account needed.
shareLink.sharedStatus: This list is being shared publicly.

invite.copyLinkHint: They already have an account — send them this link to join.
invite.copyLinkToast: {email} already has an account — copy this link and send it to them
invite.emailFailed: Couldn't send the email — share this link instead
invite.removeMemberDescription: They will lose access to this list immediately.
invite.cancelInviteDescription: They will no longer be able to join using this invitation.

partner.title: Your partner
partner.unpairDescription: You'll both lose access to shared lists. This can't be undone.
partner.unpairedHint: Invite your partner to share lists together.
partner.cancelInviteDescription: They will no longer be able to join using this invitation.
partner.copyLinkToast: {email} already has an account — copy this link and send it to them
partner.emailFailed: Couldn't send the email — share this link instead

us.soloHeadline: This app is built for two
us.soloSupporting: Lists, wishlists and dates all become shared the moment your partner joins you.
us.soloCaption: They'll get an email with a link — nothing to install, just sign in.
us.waitingReassurance: Nothing else to do — you'll be paired the moment they sign in.
us.cancelInviteDescription: {name} won't be able to join with this link.
us.unpairDescription: You'll both lose access to shared lists. This can't be undone.

home.pendingEmptyBody: No open items across lists right now.

items.multiAddHint: Separate with commas or new lines to add several
items.empty: No items yet — add your first item above.
items.emptyDescription: Add something you need — your partner will see it right away.
items.saveNoteError: Couldn't save note — tap to retry
items.clearCheckedError: Couldn't clear checked items — tap to retry
items.addedByOtherBulk: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} added by {user}
items.addedOtherBulk: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} added
items.imageInvalidType: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP images are allowed
items.imageTooLarge: Each photo must be under 5 MB
items.finishedToast: Finished — {count, plural, one {# one-time item} other {# one-time items}} removed

wishlist.empty: No gifts yet — add your first wish above.
wishlist.emptyDescription: Add something you're hoping for — your partner can reserve it secretly.
wishlist.uploadError: Couldn't upload photos — tap to retry
wishlist.imageInvalidType: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP images are allowed
wishlist.imageTooLarge: Each photo must be under 5 MB

publicWishlist.ogDescription: See {name}'s wishlist and reserve something special.
publicWishlist.notAvailableBody: This link may have expired, or the list may no longer be shared. Ask the person who sent it for a fresh one.
publicWishlist.reserveSuccess: Reserved — your secret is safe with this browser
publicWishlist.reserveFailed: Couldn't reserve this — tap to retry
publicWishlist.releaseFailed: Couldn't release this — tap to retry

bulkAdd.title: Add items
bulkAdd.description: Add one or more items at once. Your partner gets a single notification.
bulkAdd.submit: Add {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}
bulkAdd.addedToast: Added {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}

smartAdd.title: Smart add
smartAdd.composeDescription: Paste a recipe or a list of things you need — we'll pull out the items.
smartAdd.reviewDescription: Review what we found. Uncheck anything you don't need, or tweak the details.
smartAdd.parseError: Couldn't make sense of that — try again?
smartAdd.emptyResults: Didn't find anything in there — try pasting something else.
smartAdd.addItems: Add {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}
smartAdd.addedToast: Added {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}

addMenu.addItemDescription: Type what you need and add it to the list.
addMenu.addItemDescriptionWishlist: Paste a product link or type the details yourself.

addFromLink.previewError: Couldn't load a preview for that link.

shoppingNow.partnerBanner: {name} is at the store — add anything?

onboarding.welcomeDescription: One home for the two of you, in two rooms: Shopping for groceries and to-dos, and Wishlists for gifts. Switch between them — and see everything — from the tabs at the bottom.
onboarding.createDescription: Give it a name and pick a type — a shopping list or a wishlist. It lands in the matching room.
onboarding.inviteDescription: Share a list by email. When they sign up with that address, they join automatically — no extra steps.
onboarding.itemsDescription: Tap Add to drop in items — with a photo, price, or a pasted link that fills in the details for you. Check them off as you go; your partner sees updates instantly.
onboarding.shareDescription: Open a wishlist and tap Share for a public link. Send it to friends or family — they can reserve a gift so no one buys the same thing, and reservations stay hidden from you. Surprise kept.
onboarding.completeError: Couldn't save your progress — try again

settings.title: Settings
settings.pushUnsupported: Push notifications aren't supported in this browser.
settings.installHint: On iPhone: Share → Add to Home Screen. On Android: use Install when prompted.
settings.showTutorialHint: Replay the welcome walkthrough from the start.
settings.replayError: Couldn't reset the tutorial — try again

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Share an idea or report something that isn't working.
feedback.placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind…

install.title: Add Couples to your home screen
install.description: Get quick access and notifications like a native app.
install.compactTitle: Install Couples on your home screen

errors.genericDescription: We couldn't load this page. Try again in a moment.
errors.setupDescription: There was a problem connecting your profile. This usually fixes itself with a retry.
errors.notFoundDescription: That page doesn't exist or may have moved.

push.prompt: Get notified when your partner adds items?

api.invalidEmail: That doesn't look like a valid email address
api.missingEmailClaim: Clerk session token is missing the `email` claim — add it in Clerk Dashboard → Sessions → Customize session token
api.noListAccess: You don't have access to this list
api.invalidBulkItems: Invalid items — check names and try again
api.bulkInsertError: Could not add items — try again
api.textTooLong: That's a lot of text — try a smaller chunk
api.parseFailed: Couldn't make sense of that text — try rephrasing or pasting less at once
api.feedbackNotFound: Feedback not found or already resolved
api.forbidden: You don't have access to this
api.invalidLinkPreview: That link doesn't look valid — check the URL and try again
api.linkPreviewFailed: Couldn't fetch a preview for that link
api.linkPreviewExpired: That preview expired — paste the link again
api.fromLinkInsertError: Couldn't add that item — try again
api.fromLinkImageError: Couldn't save the product image — try again
api.shoppingNowBody: Add anything you need to the list
